response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is overwhelmingly in web and full-stack software development, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators, despite extensive experience in JavaScript/TypeScript and open-source tooling.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple domains
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership
Proven ability to build and optimize high-performance systems (e.g., low-latency DLang apps)
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator hardware modeling
Lacks background in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware-focused experience

key_factors.factor: No AI accelerator or GPU performance optimization background
Web-focused career vs. hardware-software co-design requirement
